title: 10 best herbal tinctures for tonsillitis
description: Joe pye weed tinctures helps with tonsillitis because of its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce swelling and combat bacterial infections. The herb's compounds, such as beta-amyrin and eupatoriopsol, have been shown to inhibit the growth of Streptococcus pneumoniae, a common cause of tonsillitis.
